title: Zeph's Vanilla+
description: My favorite optimization and QoL mods, all in one place. Designed to improve performance while maintaining a strict vanilla feel, with sparse new content along the way.
body:
# 📕About
My favorite optimization and QoL mods, all in one place. Designed to improve performance while maintaining a strict vanilla feel, with sparse new content along the way. Originally made for a small group of friends, this pack will also work on larger servers. The mods add a few new structures with very few new blocks, with a strict no-new-tools policy. There's also some mods for technical players thrown in to help them monitor performance and farms. 

# 📙Installation Instructions
This pack has been tested in a few of the most popular launchers, but I've decided to focus on the Prism launcher, which could be downloaded [here](https://prismlauncher.org). Once you download for your respective platform, follow the install instructions below. There is an auto-updating version of the pack for advanced users which can be found under the mod pack's [repository](https://github.com/ZephWasTaken/Zephs-Vanilla-Plus).
> 1. Download the mod's .mrpack file for the latest version
> 2. Open the .mrpack file with the Prism launcher
> 3. Click the browse button and change the file type from .zip to .mrpack
> 4. Select the .mrpack file from wherever you downloaded it to
* There is an auto-updating version of the pack which can be found above, but should be used only if you're familiar with debugging the install
